dynamicModel.title: Claude Code Dynamic Model Switching
dynamicModel.description: Dynamically switch backend models via the /select-model command in Claude Code conversations. Model selection is valid within the current session (24h) and does not affect routing configuration.

config.title: Configuration
config.description: Create a Command file in the Claude Code project or global directory:

usage.title: Usage
usage.selectModel: Select a model and remember it for the current session:
usage.verify: After switching, confirm the status in the Active Sessions table below. Check request logs to verify routing.

sessions.title: Active Sessions
sessions.description: View and manage sessions with configured models
sessions.confirmClearDescription: After clearing, this session will revert to the default model mapping. This action cannot be undone.

toolRoundLimit.title: Tool Call Round Limit
toolRoundLimit.description: Detect consecutive AI tool call rounds (assistant → tool_use → user → tool_result counts as one round). Automatically injects a prompt after 5 rounds to prevent infinite loops.

toolCallLoop.title: Tool Call Loop Detection
toolCallLoop.description: Detect repeated calls to the same tool by the model. Automatically interrupts the request or injects a prompt when the threshold is exceeded.

streamLoop.title: SSE Output Loop Detection
streamLoop.description: Detect content repetition loops in streaming output (N-gram pattern). Automatically interrupts the stream when the threshold is exceeded.
